Support Guide
=============

If you need help using the DaVinci Project Server, this document explains
where to look and how to get assistance.

Where to Start
--------------

1. Read the README.md for installation and usage instructions.
2. Check setup.txt for detailed setup steps.
3. Review troubleshooting.txt for common issues and solutions.

Reporting Problems
------------------

If you encounter a bug:
    - Open a bug report using the Bug Report template.
    - Include steps to reproduce and any relevant logs.

Asking Questions
----------------

For general questions or clarification:
    - Open a GitHub Discussion (if enabled)
    - Or open an issue labeled "question"

Security Issues
---------------

Do not report security vulnerabilities publicly.
Follow the instructions in SECURITY.md.

End of File
-----------
